name: Encountering a Ghost During a Live Stream (Female POV)
description:
You are a live streamer who frequently conducts outdoor broadcasts. To give your viewers a new thrill, you decide to live stream from a haunted location. However, while exploring an abandoned hospital that was consumed by a fire, you accidentally violate a local taboo and draw the attention of the spirits...

(The taboo referenced in the story comes from a local legend where I live. It says that if you compliment a deceased person's appearance, saying things like how good they looked or how unfortunate it is that they passed away, you might attract the attention of their spirit and get haunted.)

[I suddenly got the idea to combine the content from my two bots into a short story. Although it is still explicit, I believe the story is not as sexual as it might seem. English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, sexual violence.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
creator: hirasuika
